title: [CAM] Implement YAML campaign schema and loader
body:
## Objective
Define and implement the YAML campaign schema and a Python loader that validates and parses campaign files.

## Schema
```yaml
campaign_id: EPS-VAL-001
description: EPS subsystem validation campaign
svf_version: '0.1'
model_baseline: eps_integrated_v1
requirements:
  - EPS-011
  - EPS-012
test_cases:
  - id: TC-PWR-001
    test: tests/spacecraft/test_eps.py::test_tc_pwr_001
    timeout: 60
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- CampaignDefinition dataclass covering all fields
- CampaignLoader parses YAML with schema validation
- Missing required fields raise descriptive errors
- SHA-256 hash of campaign file recorded at load time
- Unit tests cover valid load, missing fields, invalid schema

## Implements
SVF-DEV-050, SVF-DEV-051, SVF-DEV-052, SVF-DEV-053

title: [CAM] Implement campaign executor via pytest
body:
## Objective
Implement a campaign executor that reads a campaign YAML and drives pytest to run the specified test cases in order.

## Design
- CLI: svf run campaigns/eps_validation.yaml
- Internally calls pytest programmatically with the specified test node IDs
- Per-test-case timeout enforced via pytest-timeout
- Campaign execution record written to results/{campaign_id}/

## Acceptance Criteria
- CampaignExecutor.run(campaign) calls pytest with correct node IDs
- Per-test timeout respected — test marked ERROR if exceeded
- Execution record includes: campaign_id, file hash, SVF version, timestamp, verdicts
- Integration test runs EPS campaign end to end

## Implements
SVF-DEV-050, SVF-DEV-051, SVF-DEV-054

title: [REP] JUnit XML with ECSS verdict and requirement metadata
body:
## Objective
Enrich the JUnit XML output with ECSS verdict and requirement metadata so CI pipelines get structured test data.

## Acceptance Criteria
- JUnit XML includes requirement IDs as custom properties
- ECSS verdict (PASS/FAIL/ERROR/INCONCLUSIVE) included per test case
- Campaign ID and model baseline included as suite-level properties
- Output consumable by Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions without plugins

## Implements
SVF-DEV-070, SVF-DEV-071, SVF-DEV-072, SVF-DEV-074

title: [REP] Self-contained HTML campaign report
body:
## Objective
Generate a self-contained HTML report after each campaign run. No external dependencies — opens in any browser.

## Design
- Jinja2 template rendered to results/{campaign_id}/report.html
- Single file — CSS and JS inlined
- Shows: campaign metadata, test case verdicts with colour coding, requirement traceability table, execution timeline

## Acceptance Criteria
- report.html generated after campaign run
- Colour coded verdicts: green PASS, red FAIL, orange ERROR, grey INCONCLUSIVE
- Requirements traceability table: requirement ID, description, test case, verdict
- Campaign metadata: campaign_id, SVF version, model baseline, timestamp, file hash
- No external dependencies at render time

## Implements
SVF-DEV-071, SVF-DEV-073, SVF-DEV-074, SVF-DEV-075

title: [CAM] Write EPS validation campaign YAML
body:
## Objective
Write the reference campaign YAML file that validates the integrated EPS FMU.

## Acceptance Criteria
- campaigns/eps_validation.yaml committed
- Covers TC-PWR-001 through TC-PWR-005
- References EPS-011 through EPS-013
- Campaign runs cleanly via svf run
- HTML report generated and committed to docs/examples/

## Implements
SVF-DEV-051
